mapper.sql: l.id, l.lease_number, l.property_id, p.property_name, l.tower_id, tw.tower_name, l.unit_id, l.customer_id, c.customer_name, u.unit_code, u.unit_name, l.lease_type, l.lease_status, l.occupancy_status, l.rent_amount, l.currency, l.security_deposit, COALESCE(lu.total_lease_units, 0) AS total_lease_units, COALESCE(lu.total_lease_area, 0) AS total_lease_area, COALESCE(lu.total_rent, l.rent_amount) AS total_rent, COALESCE(lu.total_deposit, l.security_deposit) AS total_deposit, COALESCE(lu.total_charges, 0) AS total_charges, l.renewal_status, l.parent_lease_id, l.parent_lease_reference, l.version_number, l.created_by, CAST(l.created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date, l.request_initiator, l.approval_status, l.document_status, l.payment_status, l.registration_status, l.handover_status, l.settlement_status, CAST(l.start_date AS VARCHAR) AS start_date, CAST(l.end_date AS VARCHAR) AS end_date, CAST(l.free_period_start AS VARCHAR) AS free_period_start, CAST(l.free_period_end AS VARCHAR) AS free_period_end, CAST(l.fit_out_period_start AS VARCHAR) AS fit_out_period_start, CAST(l.fit_out_period_end AS VARCHAR) AS fit_out_period_end, l.notes, COALESCE(( SELECT t.transaction_type FROM pm_lease_transaction t WHERE t.lease_id = l.id AND t.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1 ), 'LEASE') AS latest_transaction_type
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pm_lease l INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = l.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = l.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = l.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = l.customer_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lease_id, COUNT(*) AS total_lease_units, SUM(area) AS total_lease_area, SUM(rent) AS total_rent, SUM(deposit) AS total_deposit, SUM(additional_charges + tax) AS total_charges FROM pm_lease_unit WHERE is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY lease_id ) lu ON lu.lease_id = l.id WHERE l.id = #{id} AND l.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM pm_lease l INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = l.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = l.tower_id INNER JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = l.unit_id INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = l.customer_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lease_id, COUNT(*) AS total_lease_units, SUM(area) AS total_lease_area, SUM(rent) AS total_rent, SUM(deposit) AS total_deposit, SUM(additional_charges + tax) AS total_charges FROM pm_lease_unit WHERE is_deleted = FALSE GROUP BY lease_id ) lu ON lu.lease_id = l.id WHERE l.lease_number = #{leaseNumber} AND l.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unit_master WHERE id = #{unitId} AND is_deleted = FALSE AND (status != 'ACTIVE' OR occupancy_status != 'VACANT')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pm_lease ( tenant_id, lease_number, property_id, tower_id, unit_id, customer_id, lease_type, lease_status, occupancy_status, currency, rent_amount, security_deposit, renewal_status, request_initiator, approval_status, document_status, payment_status, registration_status, handover_status, settlement_status, start_date, end_date, free_period_start, free_period_end, fit_out_period_start, fit_out_period_end, created_by, notes ) VALUES ( 1, #{leaseNumber}, #{propertyId}, #{towerId}, #{unitId}, #{customerId}, #{leaseType}, #{leaseStatus}, #{occupancyStatus}, #{currency}, #{rentAmount}, #{securityDeposit}, #{renewalStatus}, #{requestInitiator}, #{approvalStatus}, #{documentStatus}, #{paymentStatus}, #{registrationStatus}, #{handoverStatus}, #{settlementStatus}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{freePeriodStart}, #{freePeriodEnd}, #{fitOutPeriodStart}, #{fitOutPeriodEnd}, #{createdBy}, #{notes} )
mapper.update: UPDATE unit_master SET occupancy_status = #{occupancyStatus}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{unitId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT lu.id, lu.lease_id, lu.property_id, p.property_name, lu.unit_id, lu.unit_number, lu.area, lu.rent, lu.additional_charges, lu.deposit, lu.tax, lu.fit_out_period, lu.unit_lease_status FROM pm_lease_unit lu INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = lu.property_id WHERE lu.lease_id = #{leaseId} AND lu.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY lu.id
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_lease SET lease_number = #{request.leaseNumber}, property_id = #{request.propertyId}, tower_id = #{request.towerId}, unit_id = #{request.unitId}, customer_id = #{request.customerId}, lease_type = #{request.leaseType}, lease_status = #{request.leaseStatus}, occupancy_status = #{request.occupancyStatus}, currency = #{request.currency}, rent_amount = #{request.rentAmount}, security_deposit = #{request.securityDeposit}, renewal_status = #{request.renewalStatus}, request_initiator = #{request.requestInitiator}, approval_status = #{request.approvalStatus}, document_status = #{request.documentStatus}, payment_status = #{request.paymentStatus}, registration_status = #{request.registrationStatus}, handover_status = #{request.handoverStatus}, settlement_status = #{request.settlementStatus}, start_date = #{request.startDate}, end_date = #{request.endDate}, free_period_start = #{request.freePeriodStart}, free_period_end = #{request.freePeriodEnd}, fit_out_period_start = #{request.fitOutPeriodStart}, fit_out_period_end = #{request.fitOutPeriodEnd}, created_by = #{request.createdBy}, notes = #{request.notes}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE pm_lease SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.lease_id, l.lease_number, t.transaction_number, t.transaction_type, t.previous_version_number, t.new_version_number, t.transaction_status, CAST(t.effective_start_date AS VARCHAR) AS effective_start_date, CAST(t.effective_end_date AS VARCHAR) AS effective_end_date, t.revised_rent_amount, t.revised_security_deposit, t.target_unit_id, u.unit_code AS target_unit_code, t.reason, t.notes, t.created_by, CAST(t.created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date FROM pm_lease_transaction t INNER JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = t.lease_id LEFT JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = t.target_unit_id WHERE t.lease_id = #{leaseId} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.lease_id, l.lease_number, t.transaction_number, t.transaction_type, t.previous_version_number, t.new_version_number, t.transaction_status, CAST(t.effective_start_date AS VARCHAR) AS effective_start_date, CAST(t.effective_end_date AS VARCHAR) AS effective_end_date, t.revised_rent_amount, t.revised_security_deposit, t.target_unit_id, u.unit_code AS target_unit_code, t.reason, t.notes, t.created_by, CAST(t.created_date AS VARCHAR) AS created_date FROM pm_lease_transaction t INNER JOIN pm_lease l ON l.id = t.lease_id LEFT JOIN unit_master u ON u.id = t.target_unit_id WHERE t.transaction_number = #{transactionNumber} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update:
UPDATE pm_lease
lease_status = #{leaseStatus}, renewal_status = #{renewalStatus}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, rent_amount = #{rentAmount}, security_deposit = #{securityDeposit}, unit_id = #{unitId}, version_number = #{versionNumber}, notes = #{notes}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN u.unit_type = 'OFFICE' THEN 1850 WHEN u.unit_type = 'RETAIL' THEN 920 ELSE 1100 END
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS unit_id, p.id AS property_id, tw.id AS tower_id, p.property_name, tw.tower_name, u.unit_code AS unit_number, u.unit_type, AS area, 'Sq.ft' AS area_unit, u.occupancy_status AS current_occupancy_status, CASE WHEN cl.id IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE CONCAT(CAST(cl.start_date AS VARCHAR), ' to ', CAST(cl.end_date AS VARCHAR)) END AS current_lease_period, COALESCE(( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(lf.lease_number, ': ', CAST(COALESCE(lf.fit_out_period_start, lf.start_date) AS VARCHAR), ' to ', CAST(lf.end_date AS VARCHAR)) SEPARATOR '; ') FROM pm_lease lf WHERE lf.is_deleted = FALSE AND lf.unit_id = u.id AND COALESCE(lf.fit_out_period_start, lf.start_date) > CURRENT_DATE() ), '-') AS future_periods, CAST(COALESCE(( SELECT DATEADD('DAY', 1, MAX(le.end_date)) FROM pm_lease le WHERE le.is_deleted = FALSE AND le.unit_id = u.id AND le.lease_status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING_APPROVAL', 'SUSPENDED', 'TERMINATION_REVIEW') ), CURRENT_DATE()) AS VARCHAR) AS available_from, '-' AS available_to, CASE WHEN cl.fit_out_period_start IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE CONCAT(CAST(cl.fit_out_period_start AS VARCHAR), ' to ', CAST(cl.fit_out_period_end AS VARCHAR)) END AS fit_out_period, CASE WHEN cl.free_period_start IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE CONCAT(CAST(cl.free_period_start AS VARCHAR), ' to ', CAST(cl.free_period_end AS VARCHAR)) END AS free_period, COALESCE(c.customer_name, '-') AS tenant_details, CASE WHEN cl.fit_out_period_start IS NOT NULL AND CURRENT_DATE() >= cl.fit_out_period_start AND CURRENT_DATE() < cl.start_date THEN 'FIT_OUT' WHEN cl.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'LEASED' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_unit ru INNER JOIN reservation r ON r.id = ru.reservation_id WHERE ru.unit_id = u.id AND ru.is_deleted = FALSE AND r.is_deleted = FALSE AND ru.reservation_status IN ('DRAFT', 'RESERVED') AND r.reservation_status IN ('DRAFT', 'RESERVED') AND r.reservation_date <= CURRENT_DATE() AND r.expiry_date >= CURRENT_DATE() ) THEN 'RESERVED' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS timeline_status, CAST(cl.start_date AS VARCHAR) AS current_lease_start, CAST(cl.end_date AS VARCHAR) AS current_lease_end, CAST(cl.fit_out_period_start AS VARCHAR) AS fit_out_start, CAST(cl.fit_out_period_end AS VARCHAR) AS fit_out_end, CAST(cl.free_period_start AS VARCHAR) AS free_period_start, CAST(cl.free_period_end AS VARCHAR) AS free_period_end FROM unit_master u INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = u.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = u.tower_id LEFT JOIN pm_lease cl ON cl.id = ( SELECT l2.id FROM pm_lease l2 WHERE l2.is_deleted = FALSE AND l2.unit_id = u.id AND l2.lease_status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PENDING_APPROVAL', 'SUSPENDED', 'TERMINATION_REVIEW') AND COALESCE(l2.fit_out_period_start, l2.start_date) <= CURRENT_DATE() AND l2.end_date >= CURRENT_DATE() ORDER BY COALESCE(l2.fit_out_period_start, l2.start_date), l2.id LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = cl.customer_id
ORDER BY p.property_name, tw.tower_name, u.unit_code LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unit_master u INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = u.property_id INNER JOIN tower tw ON tw.id = u.tower_id
